name: Restart Checklist
about: Use this template to capture quick context for resuming work.

## What was completed
- Briefly summarize the work completed in this session.
- Example: "Added `graph/state.py` and `graph/builder.py` skeleton."

## What remains
- List the next concrete tasks.
- Example: "Implement LangGraph node wiring, add `agents/` modules."

## Current branch
- Indicate the git branch you were working on.
- Example: `main` or `feature/langgraph-skeleton`

## Files to open first
- List the files that are most relevant to resume work.
- Example: `graph/builder.py`, `main.py`, `REPO-SETUP.md`

## Notes
- Add any special context, blockers, or commands needed next.
- Example: "Use `./startup.sh` to initialize env."
